final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing WeChat public account article cover for "染秋" fragrance new product launch, centered composition with premium editorial aesthetic, in the quiet warmth of 原研哉's restrained luxury.

Style/medium: premium editorial cover design with the matte restraint and breathing elegance of high-end fragrance brand identity, where every element earns its place
Composition: centered composition, title as the visual anchor at the heart of the canvas, surrounded by generous negative space that lets the fragrance story breathe
Subject: "染秋" fragrance new product launch cover — a single hero visual of an autumn-toned fragrance bottle or abstract autumnal form centered on the canvas, title text as the dominant foreground element
Scene/backdrop: soft autumnal atmosphere — fallen leaves, amber haze, or abstract ink-wash suggestion of autumn depth
Lighting/mood: the hushed golden warmth of late afternoon autumn light, diffused and tender, no hard shadows — the feeling of time suspended in amber
Color palette: warm amber and deep ochre in quiet conversation with muted sage and pale ivory, the chromatic memory of autumn held in still air
Materials/textures: matte paper surface with the faint grain of fine uncoated stock, soft ink diffusion at the edges
Text (verbatim): 染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香
Constraints: title "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香" must be prominently displayed and visually dominant; canvas ratio 900×500 (16:9 horizontal); centered composition strictly observed
Avoid: busy backgrounds, harsh contrast, cluttered layout, generic stock-photo autumn clichés, neon or cool-toned color intrusion
